2605.19822.title: ST-TGExplainer: Disentangling Stability and Transition Patterns for Temporal GNN Interpretability
2605.19822.paper_summary: Temporal graph neural networks (TGNNs) have gained significant traction for solving real-world temporal graph tasks. However, their interpretability remains limited, as most TGNNs fail to identify which historical interactions most influence a given prediction. Despite promising progress on interpretable TGNNs, existing methods predominantly focus on previously seen historical interactions, which we term stability patterns, while overlooking newly emerging first-time interactions, which we term transition patterns. Both types of patterns are essential for faithful temporal explanations. To address this limitation, we propose ST-TGExplainer, a self-explainable TGNN that disentangles Stability and Transition patterns in temporal graphs for a more faithful Temporal GNN Explainer. Guided by a disentangled information bottleneck objective, ST-TGExplainer learns a compact explanatory subgraph that remains predictive of the event label while explicitly suppressing label-conditioned redundancy between stability and transition patterns. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ST-TGExplainer achieves strong predictive performance and yields more faithful explanations. Code is available at https://github.com/hjchen-hdu/ST-TGExplainer.
2605.19822.paper_summary_zh: 時間圖神經網絡（TGNNs）在解決現實世界的時間圖任務中獲得了顯著的關注。<lb/>然而，它們的可解釋性仍然有限，因為大多數TGNN無法識別哪些歷史互動對給定預測的影響最大。<lb/>儘管在可解釋的TGNN上取得了有希望的進展，但現有方法主要集中在先前見過的歷史互動上，我們稱之為穩定模式，同時忽略了新出現的首次互動，我們稱之為過渡模式。<lb/>這兩種類型的模式對於真實的時間解釋都是必不可少的。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了ST-TGExplainer，一種自我解釋的TGNN，能夠在時間圖中解開穩定和過渡模式，以實現更真實的時間GNN解釋器。<lb/>在解開信息瓶頸目標的指導下，ST-TGExplainer學習了一個緊湊的解釋子圖，該子圖在保持對事件標籤的預測能力的同時，明確抑制了穩定和過渡模式之間的標籤條件冗餘。<lb/>大量實驗表明，ST-TGExplainer實現了強大的預測性能並提供了更真實的解釋。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/hjchen-hdu/ST-TGExplainer 獲得。
2605.19822.author: Hongjiang Chen et.al.
2605.19822.authors: Hongjiang Chen, Xin Zheng, Pengfei Jiao, Huan Liu, Zhidong Zhao, Huaming Wu, Feng Xia, Shirui Pan
